characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, dark complexion. He has black hair styled upwards, a beard, and wears round wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a white line-drawing graphic on the chest, dark pants. He wears a watch on his left wrist and a bracelet on his right.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: English बोलने से पहले अभी भी मन में translate करते हो? Bro, that's holding you back. Watch this. [Do you still translate in your mind before speaking English? Bro, that's holding you back. Watch this.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out a common pain point (translating in the head before speaking).
- Establishes a relatable, older-sibling tone.
- Transitions directly into a demonstration.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Hi, I want to order... uh, ek coffee... I mean, one cappuccino please. And... uh... parcel कर दीजिये... I mean, make it takeaway. [Hi, I want to order... uh, a coffee... I mean, one cappuccino please. And... uh... pack it... I mean, make it takeaway.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a realistic, relatable struggle with spoken English in a cafe setting.
- Shows the user making mistakes and self-correcting naturally.
- Sets up the AI tutor's role for the next scene.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: मैंने अभी एक real-life situation practice की, बिना किसी डर के। Supernova का AI tutor आपकी टूटी-फूटी English सुनता है और बिना judge किये आपको सही बोलना सिखाता है। [I just practiced a real-life situation, without any fear. Supernova's AI tutor listens to your broken English and teaches you to speak correctly without judging.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the core value proposition: judgment-free AI practice.
- Highlights the app's ability to handle mistakes and teach correct phrasing.
- Replaces the competitor's tech-heavy pitch with an emotional, confidence-building message.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: No judgment, no hesitation. अगर अभी भी सिर्फ grammar rules रट रहे हो, तो you're missing out on real growth. Supernova app download करो and thank me later. [No judgment, no hesitation. If you're still just cramming grammar rules, then you're missing out on real growth. Download the Supernova app and thank me later.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong call to action emphasizing practical growth over rote learning.
- Removes the 'free' claim as per brand guidelines.
- Ends with a confident, encouraging sign-off.
